About Me

I'm Justin Hnat, a rising sophomore studying Mechanical Engineering at Penn State University. I'm passionate about 3D design, rapid prototyping, and turning ideas into physical reality through engineering.

From thermal management components to game-ready assets, my work spans CAD modeling, FDM printing, and advanced surface modeling — always pushing the limits of what's printable and manufacturable.

Fusion 36090%
Blender75%
3D Printing / FDM85%
CAD / Parametric Design88%
MATLAB60%

Featured Projects

◈ LIVE 3D Drag · Scroll · Zoom

PROJECT_01

DeltaT Thermal Block

ThermalFDM PrintMechanical

A precision-engineered thermal management block designed for delta-temperature (ΔT) measurement studies. Features optimized internal channel geometry for heat-flux analysis and thermocouple mounting, fabricated via FDM 3D printing.

Type
Thermal Block
Triangles
966
Process
FDM Print
Application
Heat Transfer
◈ LIVE 3D Drag · Scroll · Zoom

PROJECT_02

Spiral Fidget Ring

HelicalParametricFunctional

A 3-inch spiral fidget outer shell with interlocking helical geometry. The continuous swept profile demonstrates advanced swept-surface and multi-body modeling. Satisfying tactile design built for SLA or FDM printing.

Size
3 inches
Triangles
~50K
Profile
Helical Sweep
Type
Fidget / Tactile
◈ LIVE 3D Drag · Scroll · Zoom

PROJECT_03

Royal Crown

SculpturalDecorativeHigh-Poly

An intricately detailed royal crown featuring ornamental arches, gem settings, and embossed surface detail. A showcase of advanced surface modeling and subdivision sculpting techniques applied to heraldic design.

Type
Regalia
Triangles
47,378
Detail
High-poly
Software
ATF CAD
◈ LIVE 3D Drag · Scroll · Zoom

PROJECT_04

Warhammer

MechanicalPropStructural

A detailed warhammer prop combining cylindrical handle geometry with a precision-faced hammerhead. Demonstrates compound solid modeling, Boolean operations, and weight-balanced structural design for cosplay or display printing.

Type
Prop / Weapon
Triangles
41,520
Build
Multi-body
Software
ATF CAD
◈ LIVE 3D Drag · Scroll · Zoom

PROJECT_05

Super Magical Chest

BlenderGame AssetUltra-Detail

A highly detailed magical treasure chest modeled in Blender, featuring ornate banding, latch hardware, and gem inlays. Built as a game-ready environment prop showcasing the modeling pipeline used in AAA game development and CGI.

Software
Blender 2.78
Triangles
119,334
Type
Game Asset
Detail
Ultra High-poly

// ACADEMIC_LOG.txt

Timeline

2023
First 3D Print
Completed first successful FDM print and became fascinated with the intersection of digital design and physical fabrication.
2024
Learned Fusion 360
Mastered parametric CAD modeling in Fusion 360, building increasingly complex multi-body assemblies and running basic simulations.
2025
Enrolled at Penn State · ME
Began Mechanical Engineering studies at Penn State University. Joined the engineering design community and started building this portfolio.
2025
Advanced Projects
Developed the DeltaT Thermal Block, Spiral Fidget Ring, and other complex models — exploring thermal design, organic forms, and game asset pipelines.
2026 →
Rising Sophomore · Now
Continuing to expand engineering knowledge. Seeking internship opportunities in mechanical design, product development, and rapid prototyping.
